name: Elastic N.V.
summary: Elastic N.V. is a technology company that builds search-powered solutions. Its core products include Elasticsearch, Kibana, and the Elastic Stack, offered via self-managed subscriptions and cloud-based Elastic Cloud deployments. Elastic serves enterprise use cases including search, observability, and security analytics. The company operates globally and generates revenue primarily through subscriptions, including consumption-based arrangements for its cloud offerings.

products.name: Elasticsearch
products.description: Core search and analytics engine, previously offered under open source license, now under proprietary licensing.

products.name: Kibana
products.description: Visualization and management interface for Elasticsearch, previously open source, now under proprietary licensing.

products.name: Elastic Stack
products.description: Integrated suite including Elasticsearch and Kibana for search, observability, and security use cases.

products.name: Elastic Cloud
products.description: Cloud-based managed deployment of Elastic offerings, available on consumption-based and subscription arrangements.

partnerships.description: Cloud providers distribute and host Elastic Cloud offerings as part of go-to-market strategy.
Systems integrators help market, sell, and distribute Elastic solutions to enterprise customers.
OEM and managed service providers embed or resell Elastic offerings within their own solutions.
Channel and referral partners support Elastic's distribution and sales efforts globally.
Technology partners integrate with Elastic products to extend solution capabilities.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
